task_completion.description: Create at least 3 partition walls and 3 doors to divide the space into distinct zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, look for at least 3 newly drawn interior walls and at least 3 doors placed within those walls to create separate rooms.

task_completion.description: Place at least 14 rack-like items arranged in rows in the Server Room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a designated room containing at least 14 shelves, cabinets, or server racks. They must be arranged in distinct, organized rows.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Network Operations Center (NOC) with at least 5 desks, 5 chairs, and 3 lamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a room (likely labeled NOC) containing a minimum of 5 desks, 5 office chairs, and 3 lamps (desk lamps, floor lamps, or ceiling lights).

task_completion.description: Place at least 2 tables in the Staging/Receiving area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a designated area containing at least 2 tables (distinct from the NOC desks).

task_completion.description: Ensure the facility has at least 17 shelf/cabinet items and 40 furniture items overall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the furniture list pane on the left side of the screen for a dense list of items (indicating ~40+ total items) and verify there are additional shelves/cabinets outside the server room to reach at least 17 total.

task_completion.description: Add at least 5 text labels identifying zones and aisles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan for at least 5 distinct text elements (e.g., 'Server Room', 'NOC', 'Electrical Room', 'Hot Aisle', 'Staging').
Look for the save dialog being used, or check the application title bar to ensure the filename 'data_center_starter.sh3d' does not have an asterisk (*) next to it, indicating the file has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking tools, dragging furniture from the catalog, and drawing walls in the Sweet Home 3D application, rather than using terminal scripts to modify the .sh3d file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Sweet Home 3D application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must display the authentic Sweet Home 3D interface with its catalog, furniture list, 2D plan, and 3D view panes.
The trajectory should show the layout evolving over time (walls drawn first, then furniture added, then labels) rather than a fully completed layout appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'data_center_starter.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. Expected minimum counts to verify: 3 partition walls, 3 doors, 14 racks/cabinets (arranged in rows), 5 desks, 5 chairs, 3 lamps, 2 tables, and 5 text labels. The overall facility must have at least 17 shelf/cabinet items and 40 furniture items total. The file must be saved at the end.
